name: Genex Blastfan
name_jp: ジェネクス・ブラスト
desc: When this card is Special Summoned, you can add 1 DARK "Genex" monster from your Deck to your hand.<!-- Please, do not change this text to the one found in the card database under Hidden Arsenal 2 as many of them have their old text instead of the latest text. -->
